## Epic 5 — Magic System (#53)

**Dependency:** #50, #51
**Est. Effort:** Large

### Goal
Design and write all cantrip-level spell chains (Novice tier, 0 prerequisite dice).

### Cantrip Chains (at-will, no dice requirement)
These are the spells every caster can use freely — the magical equivalent of basic attacks.

| Cantrip | School | Weak | Standard | Strong |
|---------|--------|------|----------|--------|
| Firebolt | Evocation | 1d6 fire | 1d8 fire | 1d10 fire + ignite |
| Ray of Frost | Evocation | 1d4 cold + slow 5ft | 1d6 cold + slow 10ft | 1d8 cold + slow 15ft |
| Shocking Grasp | Evocation | 1d6 lightning | 1d8 lightning | 1d10 lightning + no reactions |
| Acid Splash | Conjuration | 1d4 acid (1 target) | 1d6 acid (2 targets) | 1d8 acid (3 targets) |
| Poison Spray | Conjuration | 1d6 poison | 1d10 poison | 1d12 poison |
| Sacred Flame | Evocation | 1d6 radiant | 1d8 radiant | 1d10 radiant |
| Eldritch Blast | Evocation | 1d6 force | 1d8 force | 1d10 force + push 10ft |
| Chill Touch | Necromancy | 1d6 necrotic | 1d8 necrotic | 1d10 necrotic + can't heal |
| Vicious Mockery | Enchantment | 1d4 psychic + disadv | 1d6 psychic + disadv | 1d8 psychic + disadv |
| Thorn Whip | Transmutation | 1d4 piercing + pull 5ft | 1d6 piercing + pull 10ft | 1d8 piercing + pull 15ft |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design 15-20 cantrips with Weak/Standard/Strong effects
- [ ] Write each cantrip as an AsciiDoc entry with proper formatting
- [ ] Include narrative flavor text for each
- [ ] Create cantrip quick-reference table
